testcase.name: test_lead_assignment_rules_get_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Endpoint missing/unrouted on public URL: /api/lead-assignment/rules assert 404 != 404 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_lead_assignment_public_endpoints.py:40: in test_lead_assignment_rules_get_exists assert_not_404(response, endpoint) backend/tests/test_lead_assignment_public_endpoints.py:34: in assert_not_404 assert response.status_code != 404, f"Endpoint missing/unrouted on public URL: {endpoint}" E AssertionError: Endpoint missing/unrouted on public URL: /api/lead-assignment/rules E assert 404 != 404 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
